{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Lemon's ability
| introduced = The Pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Lemon]] can manifest waves of shining yellow acid using [[Aethertech]] implants.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c30">''The Pilot'', chapter 30</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
